extDescription.message: Gentle break reminders with stretch prompts. For desk workers who forget to move.

strictModeTooltip.message: Shows a full-screen break overlay you can't miss, instead of a notification.

browserNotificationSub.message: Works when tab is in background

maleModelSub.message: Switch to a male figure for exercises

dismissHint.message: Press Esc or click outside to dismiss

welcomeMessage.message: You'll get a gentle reminder to stretch every $MINUTES$ minutes. Stay loose!

stretchNeckRollsDesc.message: Slowly circle your head three times each direction. Let your jaw go soft.

stretchNeckRollsStep1.message: Sit or stand tall, shoulders relaxed

stretchNeckRollsStep2.message: Slowly drop your right ear toward your right shoulder

stretchNeckRollsStep3.message: Roll your head forward, chin to chest

stretchNeckRollsStep5.message: Complete 3 full slow circles each direction

stretchOverheadReachDesc.message: Interlace fingers, press palms toward the ceiling. Take two deep breaths.

stretchOverheadReachStep2.message: Inhale and raise both arms overhead

stretchOverheadReachStep3.message: Interlace your fingers, palms facing up

stretchOverheadReachStep4.message: Press up gently and hold for 3 breaths

stretchOverheadReachStep5.message: Exhale and slowly lower your arms

stretch2020Desc.message: Find something 20 feet away. Look at it for 20 seconds without blinking.

stretch2020Step1.message: Look away from your screen completely

stretch2020Step2.message: Find something at least 20 feet away

stretch2020Step3.message: Focus softly on it without straining

stretch2020Step4.message: Hold your gaze for 20 full seconds

stretch2020Step5.message: Blink slowly and return to your work

stretchWristCirclesDesc.message: Extend arms forward. Rotate wrists in wide circles — five each direction.

stretchWristCirclesStep1.message: Extend both arms in front of you

stretchWristCirclesStep2.message: Make loose fists with both hands

stretchWristCirclesStep5.message: Shake out your hands gently to finish

stretchShoulderRollsDesc.message: Roll shoulders slowly backward five times, then forward five. Release the day.

stretchShoulderRollsStep1.message: Let your arms hang loose at your sides

stretchShoulderRollsStep2.message: Lift both shoulders up toward your ears

stretchShoulderRollsStep3.message: Roll them slowly backward and down

stretchShoulderRollsStep4.message: Feel your shoulder blades squeeze together

stretchShoulderRollsStep5.message: Repeat 5 times then roll them forward

stretchSpinalTwistDesc.message: Sit tall, place one hand on the opposite knee, and gently twist.

stretchSpinalTwistStep1.message: Sit tall with feet flat on the floor

stretchSpinalTwistStep2.message: Place your right hand on your left knee

stretchSpinalTwistStep3.message: Inhale to lengthen your spine upward

stretchSpinalTwistStep4.message: Exhale and gently twist to the left

stretchForwardFoldDesc.message: Hinge forward at the hips and let your arms and head hang heavy.

stretchForwardFoldStep2.message: Inhale and grow tall through your spine

stretchForwardFoldStep3.message: Exhale and hinge forward at the hips

stretchForwardFoldStep4.message: Let your arms and head hang heavy

stretchForwardFoldStep5.message: Hold 3 breaths then slowly rise back up

stretchChestOpenerDesc.message: Clasp your hands behind your back and squeeze your shoulder blades together.

stretchChestOpenerStep1.message: Stand or sit upright and tall

stretchChestOpenerStep2.message: Clasp your hands behind your lower back

stretchChestOpenerStep4.message: Lift your chest and chin slightly upward

stretchChestOpenerStep5.message: Hold for 3 deep breaths then release

stretchSideStretchDesc.message: Raise one arm overhead and lean gently to the opposite side.

stretchSideStretchStep1.message: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart

stretchSideStretchStep3.message: Lean slowly to the left side

stretchSideStretchStep4.message: Feel the stretch along your right side

stretchChinTucksDesc.message: Gently pull your chin straight back to stretch the base of your skull.

stretchChinTucksStep1.message: Sit or stand with your spine tall

stretchChinTucksStep2.message: Look straight ahead at eye level

stretchChinTucksStep3.message: Gently pull your chin straight back

stretchChinTucksStep4.message: Feel the stretch at the base of your skull

stretchUpperBackSqueezeDesc.message: Pull your elbows back and squeeze your shoulder blades together firmly.

stretchUpperBackSqueezeStep1.message: Sit upright with arms at your sides

stretchUpperBackSqueezeStep3.message: Pull both elbows back behind your body

stretchUpperBackSqueezeStep4.message: Squeeze your shoulder blades firmly together

stretchTempleMassageDesc.message: Apply gentle circular pressure to your temples to release tension.

stretchTempleMassageStep1.message: Place your fingertips on your temples

stretchTempleMassageStep4.message: Breathe deeply and release jaw tension

stretchAnkleCirclesDesc.message: Lift your feet and rotate your ankles slowly to improve circulation.

stretchAnkleCirclesStep1.message: Sit with your feet lifted off the floor

stretchAnkleCirclesStep5.message: Flex and point your feet to finish

stretchFingerSpreadsDesc.message: Spread your fingers wide, then curl into a fist, to relieve typing strain.

stretchFingerSpreadsStep1.message: Hold both hands out in front of you

stretchFingerSpreadsStep2.message: Spread your fingers as wide as possible

stretchFingerSpreadsStep4.message: Then curl fingers into a loose fist

stretchHipStretchDesc.message: Lift one knee toward your chest to stretch your hip and glute.

stretchHipStretchStep1.message: Stand near your desk for balance

stretchHipStretchStep2.message: Lift your right knee toward your chest

stretchHipStretchStep3.message: Hold it with both hands gently

stretchHipStretchStep4.message: Feel the stretch in your hip and glute
